summary: W841 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract and routes the W839 target homology-zero left-calculus data through W653 direct finite-shape source data and W657 direct-localization triangulated source data. Dbounded.remainingStableFieldsOfClosedMapTargetHomologyZeroDirectLocalizationW841 and the closed-embedding analogue derive finite limits and finite colimits from W653 source data, while the W841 pretriangulated and triangulated declarations derive those structures from W657 direct-localization source data. Dbounded.boundedDerivedInfinityCategoryOfClosedMapTargetHomologyZeroDirectLocalizationW841 and its closed-embedding analogue assemble bounded-derived infinity-category packages from W839 data plus those direct source-side stable fields. The route still lacks concrete W735 branch data, W790 target homology-zero realization data, W653 direct finite-shape source data, W657 direct-localization triangulated source data, and the original four-task completion witness.
